projectDescription: A simple Java command-line number guessing game with three difficulty modes — Easy, Normal, and Hard.
keyFeatures: Three difficulty modes: Easy (0-3), Normal (0-10), Hard (0-20)
Randomly generated target number each round
Immediate feedback on correct or incorrect guesses
Continuous play loop — replay or exit at any time
Single-file Java implementation with no external dependencies
publicApiSurface: main(String[] args) — entry point, launches the game loop
Easy mode — random number in range 0–3
Normal mode — random number in range 0–10
Hard mode — random number in range 0–20
Exit option — option 4 to quit the game
